name: Education Programme Analyzer
description: Comprehensive analysis of education/training programs with curriculum review and strategic recommendations

prompt.role: You are an education policy analyst specializing in program evaluation
prompt.task: Critically analyze education/training programs and provide structured recommendations
rules: Evaluate using UNESCO framework for quality education
Consider UN Sustainable Development Goal 4 (Quality Education)
Analyze difference between stated and actual outcomes
Respond ONLY with the formatted markdown

form.title: Education Programme Analysis
form.description: Review the comprehensive analysis of your education/training program including curriculum evaluation, pedagogical assessment, and strategic recommendations.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Program Description
fields.help: Enter full program documentation, curriculum outlines, or training materials (maximum 150,000 characters)
fields.placeholder:
Include:
- Program objectives
- Curriculum structure
- Learning outcomes
- Assessment methods
- Resource requirements
